case_title: WATERFIELD, JAMES L. vs. MEHRAZAR, PARVIZ et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER CONTINUING STATUS CONFERENCE, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WATERFIELD, JAMES L.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WATERFIELD, JAMES L. AS TO DEFENDANT MEHRAZAR, PARVIZ EMRANIAN, ESTER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-14-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-13-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-25-1995
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER EXTENDING TIME FOR SERVICE OF COMPLAINT, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WATERFIELD, JAMES L.
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-14-1995, CONTINUED TO OCT-02-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR STATUS REPORT ON "UNINSURED MOTORIST". NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-29-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-29-1996, AND AS TO WHY PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE COURT WITH A CURRENT UNINSURED MOTORIST REPORT. HEARING SET FOR APR-04-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-02-1995, CONTINUED TO DEC-01-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE IF NECESSARY. (FOR STATUS OF "UNINSURED MOTORIST") NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-01-1995, CONTINUED TO FEB-29-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR STATUS OF "UNINSURED MOTORIST" ARBITRATION. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE IF NECESSARY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
